name: Omega Seamaster
description: A classic Omega Seamaster from the mid-1960s. Original dial in remarkable condition with only minor patina. Case has been lightly polished. Running well on original calibre movement.

name: Tissot Navigator
description: Tissot Navigator with original silver dial. Some age-appropriate wear to the case. Keeps good time. A handsome example of late-50s Swiss watchmaking.
provenance: Found at a Nordic estate sale.

name: Finnish Silver Markka 1917
description: Silver 2-markka coin struck in 1917 during a pivotal moment in Nordic history. Sharp detail on both faces. Light cabinet toning.
provenance: From a private collection assembled over 40 years.

name: Iittala Glass Vase
description: A beautifully crafted glass vase from the 1960s. Clean asymmetric form in clear glass with subtle air bubbles characteristic of the period. No chips or cracks.
provenance: Acquired from a Nordic design auction.

name: Nordic Silver Brooch
description: Sterling silver brooch with stylised floral motif. Hallmarked and in good working order. Pin mechanism functions well. A refined piece of mid-century Nordic craft.

name: Nordic Silver Ring
description: Simple, elegant silver ring with engraved geometric pattern. Hallmarked. Size approximately 17mm internal diameter. Minor surface wear consistent with age.
provenance: Found at a Nordic antique fair.
